summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BioLens Material Check app with search_biolens_scan_enriched integration. Fixed body-stream-already-read error, validated material grouping, health scores, and all major frontend/backend functionality.
passed_tests: Backend barcode lookup with valid/invalid barcodes
Backend search endpoint for all material types
Backend materials list (26 items) and popular searches
Frontend homepage loading with hero section, search bar, scan button
Search functionality: polyester hoodie → Petro-Based, High Risk, 95/100 petroload
Search functionality: bamboo sheets → Transition Material classification
Search functionality: pet bottle → PET Plastic, 72/100 petroload, 100/100 health score
Results page displays: material names, category badges, risk badges, confidence badges
Petroload arc meter with proper score visualization and color coding
Material Health Score progress bar (new feature from enriched RPC)
Better alternatives section with grouped recommendations
Find Better Materials CTA links to /explore page
Share button opens modal with Download and Story Format options
Example search chips navigation (pet bottle chip working)
No critical console errors (only React DevTools info message)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests), Frontend: 95% (all major features working)
